title: ilex × meserveae
intro: Ilex × meserveae, also known as the Meserve Holly or Blue Holly, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Ilex glabra and Ilex rugosa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids such as theobromine and caffeine, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ilex × meserveae include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as potential benefits in reducing inflammation and improving cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Ilex × meserveae are commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
